flexibleSystemArchitecture.description: Our flexible system architecture adapts to your growing business needs. With modular design and scalable infrastructure, it enables seamless integration, faster updates, and reliable performance—ensuring your technology evolves without disruption.

header.title: Our Values & Mission
header.description1: <white>is a specialized technology company established in 2018.</white> We focus on fintech, artificial intelligence, big data system development, and the design of core infrastructure. Driven by our mission to accelerate the future of business through innovation and smart solutions, we aspire to become a global leader in financial technology.
header.description2: <white>With more than 80% of our team comprised of engineers, </white>we embody strong technological expertise and an unwavering commitment to innovation.

header.title: Our Impactful Creations
header.description: Explore our diverse range of projects that showcase our expertise and commitment to innovation in the technology sector.

pocket.title: Pocket
pocket.description: A comprehensive fintech platform that integrates microloans, BNPL, leasing, savings, and payments. Leveraging AI and IT innovation, it ensures a secure, efficient, and user‑friendly financial ecosystem

pocketKg.title: Pocket KG
pocketKg.description: Pocket brings advanced fintech and AI solutions to Central Asia, powering microloans, payments, and enterprise systems

worki.title: Worki
worki.description: Designed with job seekers in mind, the platform uses advanced AI to match talent with opportunity, providing listings, resume building, and career guidance in one seamless experience

icapital.title: iCapital
icapital.description: Designed for simplicity and efficiency, the application connects investors to stocks, bonds, and investment opportunities across Mongolia’s major stock exchanges

finberry.title: Finberry
finberry.description: Designed to help creators and innovators, the platform provides flexible crowdfunding options—donations, rewards, and loans—to connect projects with supporters
